caffeine.concern: May be unsuitable for children, pregnancy-sensitive profiles, or people sensitive to stimulants.

sugar.concern: High or frequent sugar intake may be a concern for metabolic health.

glucose syrup.concern: Glucose syrup can contribute to high sugar intake.

taurine.concern: Often found in energy drinks; should be interpreted with caffeine and overall product context.

paraben.concern: Some consumers prefer avoiding certain preservatives in cosmetic products.

alcohol denat.concern: Can be drying or irritating for sensitive skin.

fragrance.concern: Fragrance may irritate sensitive skin or trigger sensitivity in some users.

palm oil.concern: May be relevant for users concerned about nutrition or sustainability.
